title: Advanced Structures: Pre-Release
description: A Minecraft mod that adds more than 60 new structures.
body:
# ADVANCED STRUCTURES: PRE-RELEASE
> *If you are not sure about downloading this, check out the gallery!*

**Advanced Structures** is a vanilla-style datapack that fills your world with over **60 hand-crafted structures**, from humble roadside wells to crumbling giant ruins swallowed by time. Every structure is designed to feel like it has always been there — weathered, overgrown, and waiting to be found.

---

## What's Included

- **60+ unique structures** spanning a wide range of scales and styles
- Structures range from **small details** like wells and waypoints to **massive multi-piece ruins** generated through Jigsaw
- Each structure uses carefully tuned **decay and aging processors** so no two generations look identical — mossy, cracked, crumbled, or half-buried
- **Lore books** hidden throughout, telling the story of a world with a history

---

## Lore

The world holds secrets. Scattered across ruins, forgotten temples, and collapsed citadels are the writings of those who came before. Find their journals, their warnings, and their maps. The story unfolds as you explore — there is no quest marker, only curiosity.

---

## Design Philosophy

Every structure is built to feel **vanilla-adjacent** — nothing that would look out of place in a Mojang update. Structures respect terrain, use familiar block palettes, and decay naturally into their surroundings. Jigsaw-based structures like the ruined citadel generate differently every time, ensuring no two worlds feel the same.

---
![frozen city](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2693cf433b96e79db1d2dcb09d4f6f29cfc4207c_0.webp)

 A special thanks to Complementary Shaders for their awesome shaderpacks!
 
---
## Pre-Release Notes

This is an **early pre-release**. Here is what is and isn't in yet:

| | Status |
|---|---|
| Overworld structures | Included |
| Lore books | Included |
| Nether structures | Not yet |
| End structures | Not yet |
| Full lore completion | In progress |

Expect bugs, missing features, and balance changes before the full release. Please report any issues you find — feedback at this stage is hugely valuable.

---

## Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21.x
- **Type:** Datapack (vanilla, no mods required)
- Compatible with most other datapacks
- Not compatible with datapacks that override the same structure sets or template pools

---

## Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder
3. Run `/reload` if adding to an existing world
4. New structures will generate in **newly generated chunks only**

---

*Full release coming in late summer 2026 with Nether and End structures, completed lore, and additional content!*
